use_cases: Schedule meetings or appointments by selecting dates on an interactive calendar
Track deadlines and due dates with today highlighting and month navigation
Book reservations or appointments in service-based applications
Filter data or content by selected date ranges in dashboards
Display event calendars for media, education, or real-estate platforms
ai_summary: A fully interactive calendar component with month navigation, date selection highlighting, and today indication. Built with React hooks and framer-motion for smooth animations, featuring a clean minimalist design with Tailwind CSS styling. Supports custom initial dates, selection callbacks, and configurable display options for flexible integration in scheduling, booking, or event management applications.
